Localization.Description: An audit daemon on a host was disabled. This could be done by attackers to hide their activity.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} changed the configuration of the audit daemon and restarted it on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} disabled the {reason} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed the configuration of the {reason} service and restarted it on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} disabled the audit daemon on host {event_src.host}
